title: Hypno's Wither Storm Pack
description: A lightweight modpack based on Cracker's Wither Storm Mod that adds voice chat and other immersive features
body:
![Hypno's Witherstorm Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/da0d22816ef8e7b8e03d9d3fc408f6a3b39c2db5.png)
### Hypno's Witherstorm is a lightweight modpack that mainly focuses on [Cracker's Wither Storm Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/crackers-wither-storm-mod) with a few quality-of-life features such as [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat) and [Xaero's Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap).
### 


The mod is preconfigured and works great out of the box. It should run on servers flawlessly.

# For Server Owners:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- It's recommended to enable `allow-flight` for best results with the tractor beams, or otherwise your players are likely to be kicked.
- Be sure to install [playerAnimator](https://modrinth.com/mod/playeranimator) onto your server along with the client-side mods, as Better Combat depends on it.

</details>



# Features:
![Feature Showcase 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/3ZM2vl9e/images/aa8c9390751ac56d8d25336432fd0d1124848746.png)

### - Per-Player Loot
### - Proximity Text Chat
### - Falling Trees
### - Dropped Item Physics

![Fight Scene](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/3ZM2vl9e/images/cc8ea843cef53dd5ebcd0edad963e1599a1e8c5b.gif)
